---
description: Load repo-backed continuity memory at chat start
---

Workflow:
1. Open and read `knowledge/continuity/project_memory.md`.
2. Skim the latest 10 lines/entries from `knowledge/continuity/session_notes.jsonl` (if present).
3. Summarize: goals, current state, constraints, next steps.
4. Ask 1–3 targeted questions only if something is ambiguous or conflicting.
